prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A transformation diagram showing a smartphone morphing into a remote control when casting to a TV. LEFT: An isometric smartphone with Orange #F59400 frame, screen showing a grid of small shoe product cards (simplified shoe icons in Blue and Orange). Label above: 'BROWSE'. The phone is detailed and full-featured. CENTER: A large dynamic arrow pointing right, labeled 'CAST TO TV' in Blue #6C82FE. Around the arrow, small UI component fragments (image cards, text blocks, thumbnail icons) are shown flying off and dissolving into particles — representing the Purge of image components from the phone. The fragments transition from solid to transparent, showing the shedding process. Pink #FC6978 particle trails. RIGHT: The same smartphone, now showing only a minimal interface — a large cross-shaped directional pad and a center OK button in White #FFFFFF on a dark screen. Below the d-pad, a tiny price display. Label above: 'REMOTE'. The phone is stripped down and clean. TOP: Connected by a thin dashed line to the right smartphone, a large isometric TV screen (Pink #FC6978 frame) displays four large shoe images in a 2x2 grid with emotional labels ('Waterproof!', 'Run-ready!'). The TV is bigger and more prominent than the phones. All forms: clean uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading. Light Gray #EEEEEE background. Generous negative space between all elements for airiness. Element White on device screen faces.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic shoes, actual product photos
